user.title: HeatPump Hero — vendor
user.description: Pick the integration that already exposes your heat pump to Home Assistant. The most common choice is `panasonic_heishamon` (the kamaradclimber custom integration). Use `keep_current` if you've already configured the source helpers manually and want to skip auto-fill.

model.title: HeatPump Hero — model
model.description: Pick the heat-pump generation. This pre-fills compressor min/max frequency, minimum water flow and maximum supply temperature with empirically validated values. Power-user overrides remain possible after install.

sensors.title: HeatPump Hero — optional sensors
sensors.description: These are optional. If you have a Shelly / IoTaWatt power meter, an MBus heat meter, or a dedicated indoor reference thermometer, point HeatPump Hero at them here. You can fill these in later via the integration options.

data.outdoor_temp_entity: Outdoor weather station temperature sensor (overrides vendor preset)

confirm.title: HeatPump Hero — confirm
confirm.description: About to install with vendor `{vendor}` and model `{model}`. After confirming, please **restart Home Assistant** so all helpers and the dashboard get loaded. The dashboard will appear in the sidebar automatically; no manual YAML import needed.

abort.single_instance_allowed: HeatPump Hero is a single-instance integration — there can only be one entry.

missing_frontend_card.title: Missing Lovelace card: {card_name}
missing_frontend_card.description: The HeatPump Hero dashboard requires the **{card_name}** Lovelace card. Install `{hacs_repo}` via HACS → Frontend, then reload the browser tab.

missing_vendor_integration.title: Vendor integration not loaded: {vendor}
missing_vendor_integration.description: HeatPump Hero is configured for vendor preset `{vendor}`, but that integration is not loaded. Ensure the `{vendor}` custom integration is installed and set up, then restart Home Assistant.

init.title: HeatPump Hero — vendor & model
init.description: Change vendor preset or heat-pump model. The next step lets you update external sensors.

sensors.title: HeatPump Hero — external sensors
sensors.description: Optional: Shelly / IoTaWatt power meter, MBus heat meter, indoor reference thermometer. Leave blank to keep current settings.

data.outdoor_temp_entity: Outdoor weather station temperature sensor (overrides vendor preset)
data.electricity_price_entity: Electricity price sensor (€/kWh or ct/kWh — e.g. Tibber, aWATTar)
data.ctrl_pv_surplus_entity: PV surplus power sensor (W) — for solar-DHW boost
data.ctrl_price_entity: Current electricity price sensor (for price-driven DHW)
